title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Vijay Sales

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Vijay Sales
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!
